name: RABBIT-SPEC-BUG-3
title: contract.md violates process-agnostic principle by naming rabbit-feature-touch as sole consumer
description: docs/spec/contract.md 'Consumed By' section names only 'rabbit-feature-touch Step 3 (main session, inline)'. Contradicts spec.md Invariant 7 (rabbit-spec MUST be process-agnostic and MUST NOT identify any specific caller as primary/sole context). The body and frontmatter have tests (test-skill-decoupled.py) enforcing this for SKILL.md, but contract.md was missed. Likewise, contract.md 'Does NOT Invoke' specifically names rabbit-feature-touch — analogous to the pattern Inv 8 forbids in SKILL.md. Fix: reword contract.md generically, and extend tests to enforce process-agnosticism on contract.md. Files: .claude/features/rabbit-spec/docs/spec/contract.md (lines 27, 32).

history.note: Wave 4 triage: duplicate of RABBIT-SPEC-BUG-4 (contract.md process-agnostic)
